csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEditor; public class Script { public static string Main() { var bgGo = GameObject.Find("Background"); if (bgGo == null) return "Background not found"; var sr = bgGo.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>(); if (sr == null) return "No SpriteRenderer"; var tex = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Texture2D>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png"); if (tex == null) return "bg.png not found"; var importer = AssetImporter.GetAtPath("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png") as TextureImporter; if (importer != null && importer.textureType != TextureImporterType.Sprite) { importer.textureType = TextureImporterType.Sprite; importer.spriteImportMode = SpriteImportMode.Single; importer.SaveAndReimport(); } var sprite = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Sprite>("Assets/Textures/UI/bg.png"); if (sprite == null) return "Could not load as Sprite"; sr.sprite = sprite; sr.sortingOrder = -100; EditorUtility.SetDirty(bgGo); UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.MarkSceneDirty(bgGo.scene); UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.SaveOpenScenes(); return "Background sprite set to bg.png and scene saved"; } }
